reliable_data_transfer module¶

class reliable_data_transfer.RDTP(_pkt, /, *, seq_num=0, ack_num=0, syn=0, ack=0, fin=0, padding=0, checksum=0)¶

Bases: Packet

aliastypes = [<class 'reliable_data_transfer.RDTP'>, <class 'scapy.packet.Packet'>]¶
fields_desc: List[AnyField] = [<IntField (RDTP).seq_num>, <IntField (RDTP).ack_num>, <BitField (RDTP).syn>, <BitField (RDTP).ack>, <BitField (RDTP).fin>, <BitField (RDTP).padding>, <IntField (RDTP).checksum>]¶
reliable_data_transfer.build_packet(data, host, port, seq_num, ack_num, syn=False, ack=False, fin=False)¶

construct a complete IP / UDP / RDTP packet

Args:

data (str or bytes): payload of packet to send host (str): destination ip address port (int or str): destination port number seq_num (int): sequence number ack_num (int): acknowledgement number syn (bool, optional): flags SYN. Defaults to False. ack (bool, optional): flags ACK. Defaults to False. fin (bool, optional): flags FIN. Defaults to False.

Returns:

scapy.packet.Packet: fully assembled packet to be sent

reliable_data_transfer.compute_checksum(data: bytes)¶

compute the checksum of data

Args:

data (bytes): data of packet to check sum of

Returns:

int: checksum value

reliable_data_transfer.receive_packet(packet, expected_seq_num, received_data) → tuple[int, bin]¶

decompose packet to see if it is data or ACK, get seq num, get checksum and compute

Args:

packet (scapy.packet.Packet): scapy packet captured by sniffer expected_seq_num (int): next sequence number received_data (dict): sequence number : payload bytes

Returns:

tuple[int, bin]: new expected sequence number , [1 on successful, 0 on fail]

reliable_data_transfer.run_sender(messages, host, port)¶

send list of byte payloads using sliding window

Args:

messages (list): ordered list of bytes payloads host (str): destination ip address port (int or str): destination udp port

reliable_data_transfer.send_ack(packet_to_reply_to: Packet, seq_num)¶

send an ACK packet to sender in response to data packet

Args:

packet_to_reply_to (sc.packet.Packet): packet being ACKed seq_num (int): sequence number being ACKed

reliable_data_transfer.send_packet(seq_num, data, host, port)¶

build and transmit a single RDTP packet

Args:

seq_num (int): sequence number for this packet data (str or bytes): payload host (str): destination IP address port (int or str): destination UDP port

Returns:

scapy.packet.Packet: packet that was sent

reliable_data_transfer.start_receiver(target_port)¶

start RDTP receiver and sniff until a FIN packet is received

Args:

target_port (int or str): UDP port to listen on

Returns:

dict: sequence number : payload bytes

reliable_data_transfer.test_sender(host, port)¶

send a set of test strings to verify end-to-end functionality

Args:

host (str): destination IP address port (int or str): destination UDP port

reliable_data_transfer.validate_checksum(packet: Packet)¶

verify rdtp checksum is correct from comparing the field versus the computed checksum

Args:

packet (sc.packet.Packet): packet with an rdtp layer

Returns:

bool: if computed checksum matches checksum field

Assignment 3
